evals.prompt: How do I find the email addresses of all the marketing people at HubSpot using Hunter?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guidance on using Hunter's Domain Search with department filter for marketing, including credit costs and verification.

assertions.name: uses_domain_search
assertions.description: Response must recommend Domain Search on hubspot.com (not Email Finder) since the user wants all emails at a company

assertions.name: department_filter
assertions.description: Response must mention filtering by department (marketing) to narrow results

assertions.name: verification_step
assertions.description: Response must recommend verifying found emails before sending, since Domain Search results have varying confidence scores

evals.prompt: I want to set up a cold email campaign in Hunter.io to 150 prospects. Walk me through the setup.
evals.expected_output: Campaign setup walkthrough including email steps, follow-ups, scheduling, tracking domain, and sender configuration.

assertions.name: campaign_steps
assertions.description: Response must walk through creating a multi-step campaign with initial email and follow-ups

assertions.name: tracking_domain
assertions.description: Response must recommend setting up a custom tracking domain for open/click tracking

assertions.name: verify_before_send
assertions.description: Response must advise verifying all 150 prospect emails before adding them as campaign recipients

evals.prompt: I want to use the Hunter API to automate finding and verifying emails for a list of 300 company domains.
evals.expected_output: API guidance covering Domain Search and Email Verifier endpoints, authentication, rate limits, and credit planning.

assertions.name: api_reference_pointer
assertions.description: Response must point the user to references/hunter-api-reference.md for the full endpoint catalog

assertions.name: rate_limits
assertions.description: Response must mention rate limits (150-600 req/min depending on plan) and recommend batching or pacing

assertions.name: credit_planning
assertions.description: Response must help the user estimate credit costs for 300 domain searches plus verification of found emails
